---
title: "smr_gtex_manhattan_plots"
author: "Nico Matthew S. Valencia"
date: "2026-04-16"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
install.packages("data.table") 
install.packages("dplyr") 
install.packages("qqman") 
install.packages("ggplot2") 
install.packages("poolr")
```

```{r}
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(qqman)
library(ggplot2)
library(poolr)

```

```{r}
smr_dir <- "/Users/nico/work/khat_gwas/smr_output"

ku_files <- list.files(
  smr_dir,
  pattern = "^ku_.*\\.smr$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

kuf_files <- list.files(
  smr_dir,
  pattern = "^kuf_.*\\.smr$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

smr_files <- c(ku_files, kuf_files)

length(smr_files)
smr_files
```

```{r}
# Test viewing of Manhattan plots w/ bonferroni pval
f <- "/Users/nico/work/khat_gwas/smr_output/ku_Artery_Aorta_allchr.smr"

df <- fread(f)

df_plot <- data.frame(
  SNP = df$topSNP,
  CHR = as.numeric(df$topSNP_chr),
  BP  = as.numeric(df$topSNP_bp),
  P   = as.numeric(df$p_SMR)
)

df_plot <- df_plot[!is.na(df_plot$P) & df_plot$P > 0, ]

threshold <- 0.05 / nrow(df_plot)

manhattan(
  df_plot,
  chr = "CHR",
  bp = "BP",
  snp = "SNP",
  p = "P",
  genomewideline = -log10(threshold),
  suggestiveline = FALSE,
  main = basename(f)
)
```

```{r}
# Manhattan plots: bonferroni

files <- smr_files

out_dir <- "/Users/nico/work/khat_gwas/smr_output/manhattan_bonf"
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

for (f in files) {

  message("Processing: ", basename(f))

  df <- fread(f)

  df_plot <- data.frame(
    SNP = make.unique(as.character(df$topSNP)),
    CHR = as.numeric(df$topSNP_chr),
    BP  = as.numeric(df$topSNP_bp),
    P   = as.numeric(df$p_SMR)
  )

  df_plot <- df_plot[
    !is.na(df_plot$CHR) &
      !is.na(df_plot$BP) &
      !is.na(df_plot$P) &
      is.finite(df_plot$P) &
      df_plot$P > 0 &
      df_plot$P <= 1,
  ]

  if (nrow(df_plot) == 0) {
    message("Skipping empty file: ", basename(f))
    next
  }

  bonf_pval <- 0.05 / nrow(df_plot)

  group <- ifelse(grepl("^kuf_", basename(f)), "KUF_AllVars", "KU_AllVars")

  tissue <- basename(f)
  tissue <- sub("^ku_", "", tissue)
  tissue <- sub("^kuf_", "", tissue)
  tissue <- sub("_allchr\\.smr$", "", tissue)

  plot_title <- paste0(
    group,
    ": ",
    tissue,
    " | Bonf. p = ",
    signif(bonf_pval, 3)
  )

  out_png <- file.path(
    out_dir,
    paste0(group, "_", tissue, "_manhattan.png")
  )

  # show in notebook
  manhattan(
    df_plot,
    chr = "CHR",
    bp = "BP",
    snp = "SNP",
    p = "P",
    genomewideline = -log10(bonf_pval),
    suggestiveline = FALSE,
    main = plot_title
  )

  # save PNG
  png(out_png, width = 1400, height = 700)

  manhattan(
    df_plot,
    chr = "CHR",
    bp = "BP",
    snp = "SNP",
    p = "P",
    genomewideline = -log10(bonf_pval),
    suggestiveline = FALSE,
    main = plot_title
  )

  dev.off()

  message("Saved: ", out_png)
}

```
```{r}
# Manhattan plots: FDR

out_dir <- "/Users/nico/work/khat_gwas/smr_output/manhattan_fdr_highlight"
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

fdr_alpha <- 0.05

for (f in smr_files) {

  message("Processing: ", basename(f))

  df <- fread(f)

  df_plot <- data.frame(
    SNP = make.unique(as.character(df$topSNP)),
    CHR = as.numeric(df$topSNP_chr),
    BP  = as.numeric(df$topSNP_bp),
    P   = as.numeric(df$p_SMR),
    Gene = as.character(df$Gene),
    probeID = as.character(df$probeID)
  )

  df_plot <- df_plot[
    !is.na(df_plot$CHR) &
      !is.na(df_plot$BP) &
      !is.na(df_plot$P) &
      is.finite(df_plot$P) &
      df_plot$P > 0 &
      df_plot$P <= 1,
  ]

  if (nrow(df_plot) == 0) {
    message("Skipping empty file: ", basename(f))
    next
  }

  df_plot$FDR <- p.adjust(df_plot$P, method = "BH")
  sig_snps <- df_plot$SNP[df_plot$FDR <= fdr_alpha]

  group <- ifelse(grepl("^kuf_", basename(f)), "KUF_AllVars", "KU_AllVars")

  tissue <- basename(f)
  tissue <- sub("^ku_", "", tissue)
  tissue <- sub("^kuf_", "", tissue)
  tissue <- sub("_allchr\\.smr$", "", tissue)

  n_sig <- length(sig_snps)

  plot_title <- paste0(
    group,
    ": ",
    tissue,
    " | BH-FDR <= ",
    fdr_alpha,
    " hits = ",
    n_sig
  )

  out_png <- file.path(
    out_dir,
    paste0(group, "_", tissue, "_manhattan_FDR_highlight.png")
  )

  # Show in notebook
  manhattan(
    df_plot,
    chr = "CHR",
    bp = "BP",
    snp = "SNP",
    p = "P",
    genomewideline = FALSE,
    suggestiveline = FALSE,
    highlight = sig_snps,
    main = plot_title,
    ylab = expression(-log[10]("SMR p-value"))
  )

  # Save PNG
  png(out_png, width = 1400, height = 700)

  manhattan(
    df_plot,
    chr = "CHR",
    bp = "BP",
    snp = "SNP",
    p = "P",
    genomewideline = FALSE,
    suggestiveline = FALSE,
    highlight = sig_snps,
    main = plot_title,
    ylab = expression(-log[10]("SMR p-value"))
  )

  dev.off()

  message("Saved: ", out_png)
}
```

```{r}
# will work on Li-Ji
```
